dialogue.speaker: people-of-babel
dialogue.englishText: Come, let us make bricks and burn them thoroughly

dialogue.speaker: people-of-babel
dialogue.englishText: Come, let us build ourselves a city and a tower with its top in the heavens, and let us make a name for ourselves, lest we be scattered over the face of the whole earth

dialogue.speaker: yhwh
dialogue.englishText: Behold, they are one people and they all have one language, and this is only the beginning of what they will do; nothing they propose to do will now be impossible for them

dialogue.speaker: yhwh
dialogue.englishText: Come, let us go down and there confuse their language so that they may not understand one another's speech
